command:
echo "=== MOVE MORENO-AI REPO FROM /tmp TO PERSISTENT PATH ==="
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup
git status --short | head -5
git log --oneline -2

echo "--- cloning to persistent location ---"
git clone http://localhost:3000/jose/Moreno-AI /home/jose/moreno-ai 2>&1

echo "--- verify clone ---"
ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/
ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/runtime/
ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/agents/ | head -10

echo "--- update poller to reference new path ---"
grep -n "moreno-ai-setup" /home/jose/claude-poller.sh 2>/dev/null | head -5
echo "(poller uses bridge commands, not this path directly)"

echo "--- disk usage of new clone ---"
du -sh /home/jose/moreno-ai/

echo "=== PERSISTENT REPO READY ==="
echo "Old path: /tmp/moreno-ai-setup (ephemeral)"
echo "New path: /home/jose/moreno-ai (persistent)"
